zh.Powick, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾波維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Lygon於大約1467年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德時，他的父親Thomas Lygon32歲，母親Anne Giffard28歲。他於1490年與Anne Beauchamp在英國武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1512年5月1日在英國武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德享年46歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Lygon于大约1467年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德时，他的父亲Thomas Lygon32岁，母亲Anne Giffard28岁。他于1490年与Anne Beauchamp在英国武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1512年5月1日在英国武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德享年46岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Lygon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possiblyalso an Americanized form of German   Leisen  .

variants.name: Lison
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from Lison in Calvados and Jura, France.
Welsh and English (Gloucestershire): variant of   Leyshon  .
Slovak (Lisoň) and Polish (Lisoń): descriptive nickname for a bald man, from a derivative of lisý ‘bald’ (see Lis ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Lygon was born about 1467, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Lygon, was 32 and his mother, Anne Giffard, was 28. He married Anne Beauchamp in 1490, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 May 1512, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Lygon est né environ 1467, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Lygon, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anne Giffard, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Anne Beauchamp en 1490, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1512, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Lygon um 1467 in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Lygon 32 und seine Mutter Anne Giffard 28. Er hat 1490 in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England Anne Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Mai 1512 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Lygon è nato il circa 1467 nel Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Lygon, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Anne Giffard, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Anne Beauchamp nel 1490, nel Madresfield, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 maggio 1512, nel Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Lygonが約1467年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Thomas Lygonは32歳，母Anne Giffardは28歳であった。1490年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドでAnne Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1512年5月1日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドで46歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチェルテンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Lygon(이)가 대략 1467년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Lygon(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Giffard(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1490년 영국 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 Anne Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1512년 5월 1일 영국 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 헬텐함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Lygon nasceu aproximadamente 1467, em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Lygon, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anne Giffard, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Beauchamp em 1490, em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1512, em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Lygon родился около 1467 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Lygon было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Giffard, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Beauchamp в 1490 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 мая 1512 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности челтенам, глоусестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Anne Beauchamp en 1490, en Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1512, en Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
